title: Quick Break
description: Quick Break enables instant block breaking in Creative mode by holding LMB, with a customizable toggle key (V by default; rebindable in Controls). Client-side only.
body:
# Quick Break Mod

QuickBreak is a simple client-side mod for Minecraft that speeds up block breaking in Creative mode.
When holding the left mouse button (LMB), blocks break instantly and continuously (up to 20 blocks per second). 
The feature can be toggled on/off with the V key (enabled by default; rebindable in Controls).
The mod works **client-side** only and doesn't require server installation. Perfect for quick building or testing.

# Features

- **Instant Creative Breaking**: Hold LMB — blocks vanish every tick (vanilla maximum speed).
- **Key Toggle**: Easily enable/disable
- **Safe**: No impact on Survival or other modes.
